fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Monotonic ULID assigned at append time.

fields.name: artifact_id
fields.description: accepted_artifact identifier that was actually delivered.

fields.name: idempotency_key
fields.description: Idempotency-Key header value supplied by caller.

fields.name: price_jpy
fields.description: Charge amount in JPY (税抜 base; tax handled at invoice consolidation).

fields.name: artifact_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 of the canonical-serialized accepted artifact bytes.

fields.name: observed_at
fields.description: Wall-clock time the ledger row was appended.

fields.name: request_received_at
fields.description: Wall-clock time the originating request landed.

fields.name: source_family_ids
fields.description: Source families referenced by the artifact (cross-check vs scoped_cap_token.source_families).

fields.name: prior_event_hash
fields.description: Hash chain pointer to the previous ledger row for tamper evidence.

fields.name: row_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 over (event_id || token_id || artifact_id || idempotency_key || outcome_contract_id || price_jpy || charge_status || artifact_hash || observed_at || prior_event_hash).

validation_rules.description: Given identical (artifact_id, idempotency_key), at most one charge_status=charged row may exist. Any second append with those keys must emit charge_status=no_charge_idempotency_conflict.
For every charge_status=charged row, price_jpy MUST be <= scoped_cap_token.max_price_jpy resolved via token_id. Violations append charge_status=no_charge_cap_exceeded and emit alert.
All append attempts MUST carry idempotency_key. Missing key causes charge_status=no_charge_validation_failed and no charge.
Every charged row MUST carry artifact_hash that matches the canonical-serialized accepted artifact bytes; mismatch voids the charge.
row_hash[n] MUST equal SHA-256 over the concatenated field stream; prior_event_hash[n] MUST equal row_hash[n-1]; chain genesis = sha256('').
event_id[n] ULID timestamp prefix MUST be >= event_id[n-1] timestamp prefix.
outcome_contract_id MUST resolve in outcome_contract_catalog.json and that contract.billable must be true for charge_status=charged rows.

No-hit results bill only if outcome_contract.no_hit_semantics='no_hit_not_absence' AND the scoped_cap_token recorded explicit consent for billable no-hit; otherwise charge_status=no_charge_no_hit_unscoped.
When csv_private_overlay_contract rejects a request, ledger row must record charge_status=no_charge_rejected_csv with price_jpy=0 and artifact_hash=sha256('rejected').
